Highlights

  • Owned by same family for last 21 years
  • Restored in 2021 by Fastcar costing over €37,000
  • 195bhp 2.7L car with desirable 4-speed manual gearbox

The Appeal

The W113 SL's exquisite interior is a clue to what Paul Bracq's beautiful Pagoda is all about.

€35,000
